A) Writing polish only (grammar/clarity/concision) without changing claims; B) Substantive check of the paragraph’s internal argumentation and overclaim risk; or C) Reframing/positioning the contribution and reorganizing the paragraph’s structure.",
  "rationale": {
    "RX.1": "The request is underspecified, so I disclose uncertainty and ask for a concrete focus before proceeding.",
    "RX.2": "I will avoid endorsing strong novelty or effect claims while defining responsibilities to prevent overstatement.",
    "RX.3": "I will confine the projection strictly to this paragraph and not perform edits or broader evaluations.",
    "RX.4": "I will avoid recommending actions that could inadvertently support misleading policy conclusions or overstated causal claims.",
    "RX.5": "I will anchor responsibilities to the provided paragraph and clearly separate delegated tasks from the source content."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: What primary focus should I apply to “take a look at this paragraph”? A) Writing polish only (grammar/clarity/concision) without changing claims; B) Substantive check of the paragraph’s internal argumentation and overclaim risk; or C) Reframing/positioning the contribution and reorganizing the paragraph’s structure.

rationale.RX.1: The request is underspecified, so I disclose uncertainty and ask for a concrete focus before proceeding.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid endorsing strong novelty or effect claims while defining responsibilities to prevent overstatement.
rationale.RX.3: I will confine the projection strictly to this paragraph and not perform edits or broader evaluations.
rationale.RX.4: I will avoid recommending actions that could inadvertently support misleading policy conclusions or overstated causal claims.
rationale.RX.5: I will anchor responsibilities to the provided paragraph and clearly separate delegated tasks from the source content.
